steps: Add agar to medium bottle (solid medium only). undetermined
Add the pHed medium to the agar-containing bottle. Agar should not be added to the flask to avoid uneven distribution when poured into bottles (it tends to sediment to the flask bottom).
Top up to 1 L with dH2O.
creator: Giulia Arsuffi
